title: Create TaskDecomposer: LLM-based input → task step plan
completion_summary: Created TaskDecomposer with keyword-based decomposition (Phase B MVP). 4 Dutch/English multi-step patterns. Handles single-step and empty input gracefully.
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/types.ts (TaskStep, TaskPlan types defined in subtask 01)
src/lib/interpreter/promptComposer.ts (lines 1-70,247-308: existing system prompt composition patterns)
acceptance_criteria: TaskDecomposer class exports decompose(input, mode): Promise<TaskPlan>
decompose uses LLM (via providerRouter) to break input into ordered TaskStep[]
Returns TaskPlan with originalInput, steps, currentStepIndex=0
Each step has unique id, description, optional tool name, status='pending'
Handles empty/whitespace input (returns empty steps array)
